title: 2026 Oscars Best Actress Predictions - Screen Rant Analysis
text: Screen Rant ranks the Best Actress nominees with Emma Stone for Bugonia at fifth, Renate Reinsve for Sentimental Value at fourth, Rose Byrne for If I Had Legs I'd Kick You at third, and Jessie Buckley as the predicted winner. Buckley dominated the awards circuit, winning at the Golden Globes, Critics' Choice Awards, BAFTA, and Actor Awards. The analysis notes that the previous nine actresses to accomplish this sweep all won the Academy Award. Kate Hudson at fifth earned her first Oscar nomination in 25 years for Song Sung Blue but failed to win any major precursor awards. Emma Stone, despite being a two-time Best Actress winner, failed to win at any major precursor event this year, undermining her candidacy.
